changeSet.author: xubaolin
changeSet.sql: ALTER TABLE `sys_user` ADD COLUMN `openid` VARCHAR(64) DEFAULT NULL COMMENT '微信openid' AFTER `password`, ADD COLUMN `unionid` VARCHAR(64) DEFAULT NULL COMMENT '微信unionid' AFTER `openid`, ADD COLUMN `wx_nickname` VARCHAR(100) DEFAULT NULL COMMENT '微信昵称' AFTER `unionid`, ADD COLUMN `wx_avatar` VARCHAR(500) DEFAULT NULL COMMENT '微信头像URL' AFTER `wx_nickname`, ADD UNIQUE KEY `uk_openid` (`openid`), ADD KEY `idx_unionid` (`unionid`);

changeSet.author: xubaolin
changeSet.sql:
-- 清空旧权限数据，重新初始化 DELETE FROM `sys_permission`;
-- 文章模块 INSERT INTO `sys_permission` (`permission_code`, `permission_name`, `resource_type`, `resource_path`, `description`, `status`, `is_delete`) VALUES ('article:publish', '发布/编辑文章', 'API', '/blog/article/createOrUpdateArticle', '创建或更新文章', 1, 0), ('article:delete', '删除文章', 'API', '/blog/article/deleteArticle', '删除文章', 1, 0),
-- 评论模块 ('comment:add', '添加评论', 'API', '/blog/comment/add', '添加评论或回复', 1, 0), ('comment:delete', '删除评论', 'API', '/blog/comment/delete', '删除评论', 1, 0),
-- AI对话模块 ('deepseek:chat', 'AI对话', 'API', '/blog/ds/sendCompletion', '使用DeepSeek AI对话', 1, 0), ('deepseek:delete', '删除对话', 'API', '/blog/ds/deleteDialogue', '删除AI对话记录', 1, 0),
-- 系统管理-用户 ('system:user:list', '查看用户列表', 'API', '/blog/sys/getUserList', '查看所有用户信息', 1, 0), ('system:login:records', '查看登录记录', 'API', '/blog/sys/getLoginRecords', '查看用户登录记录', 1, 0), ('system:login:stats', '查看登录统计', 'API', '/blog/sys/getLoginLocationStats', '查看登录地点统计', 1, 0),
-- 系统管理-角色 ('system:role:list', '查看角色列表', 'API', '/blog/role/getAllRoles', '查看所有角色', 1, 0), ('system:role:add', '新增角色', 'API', '/blog/role/add', '新增角色', 1, 0), ('system:role:update', '修改角色', 'API', '/blog/role/update', '修改角色信息', 1, 0), ('system:role:assign', '分配角色', 'API', '/blog/role/assignToUser', '为用户分配角色', 1, 0),
-- 系统管理-权限 ('system:permission:manage', '权限管理', 'API', '/blog/permission/*', '权限的增删改查和分配', 1, 0),
-- 系统管理-菜单 ('system:menu:list', '查看菜单列表', 'API', '/blog/menu/getAllMenus', '查看所有菜单', 1, 0), ('system:menu:add', '新增菜单', 'API', '/blog/menu/add', '新增菜单', 1, 0), ('system:menu:update', '修改菜单', 'API', '/blog/menu/update', '修改菜单', 1, 0), ('system:menu:delete', '删除菜单', 'API', '/blog/menu/delete', '删除菜单', 1, 0), ('system:menu:assign', '分配菜单', 'API', '/blog/menu/assignToRole', '为角色分配菜单', 1, 0);

changeSet.author: xubaolin
changeSet.sql:
INSERT INTO sys_menu ( parent_id, menu_name, menu_code, menu_type, path, component, icon, sort_order, visible, status) SELECT 10, '小程序管理', 'SYSTEM_MINIAPP', 2, '/index/miniappManage', 'views/system/miniappManage.vue', 'el-icon-cellphone', 6, 1, 1 FROM DUAL WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM sys_menu WHERE menu_code = 'SYSTEM_MINIAPP');
UPDATE sys_menu SET parent_id = 10, menu_name = '小程序管理', menu_type = 2, path = '/index/miniappManage', component = 'views/system/miniappManage.vue', icon = 'el-icon-cellphone', sort_order = 6, visible = 1, status = 1 WHERE menu_code = 'SYSTEM_MINIAPP';

changeSet.author: xubaolin
changeSet.sql: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `bazi_marriage_record` ( `id` BIGINT NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT COMMENT '主键', `account` VARCHAR(64) NOT NULL COMMENT '账号', `person_a_name` VARCHAR(64) DEFAULT NULL COMMENT '甲方姓名', `person_a_gender` VARCHAR(16) NOT NULL COMMENT '甲方性别', `person_a_calendar_type` VARCHAR(16) DEFAULT 'lunar' COMMENT '甲方日期类型', `person_a_birth_datetime` DATETIME NOT NULL COMMENT '甲方公历出生时间', `person_a_input_birth_date` VARCHAR(32) DEFAULT NULL COMMENT '甲方输入日期', `person_a_input_birth_time` VARCHAR(16) DEFAULT NULL COMMENT '甲方输入时辰', `person_a_is_leap_month` TINYINT DEFAULT 0 COMMENT '甲方是否闰月', `person_a_year_pillar` VARCHAR(16) DEFAULT NULL COMMENT '甲方年柱', `person_a_month_pillar` VARCHAR(16) DEFAULT NULL COMMENT '甲方月柱', `person_a_day_pillar` VARCHAR(16) DEFAULT NULL COMMENT '甲方日柱', `person_a_hour_pillar` VARCHAR(16) DEFAULT NULL COMMENT '甲方时柱', `person_a_ba_zi` VARCHAR(64) DEFAULT NULL COMMENT '甲方八字', `person_a_zodiac` VARCHAR(16) DEFAULT NULL COMMENT '甲方生肖', `person_a_shi_chen` VARCHAR(16) DEFAULT NULL COMMENT '甲方时辰', `person_a_lunar_text` VARCHAR(64) DEFAULT NULL COMMENT '甲方农历文本', `person_b_name` VARCHAR(64) DEFAULT NULL COMMENT '乙方姓名', `person_b_gender` VARCHAR(16) NOT NULL COMMENT '乙方性别', `person_b_calendar_type` VARCHAR(16) DEFAULT 'lunar' COMMENT '乙方日期类型', `person_b_birth_datetime` DATETIME NOT NULL COMMENT '乙方公历出生时间', `person_b_input_birth_date` VARCHAR(32) DEFAULT NULL COMMENT '乙方输入日期', `person_b_input_birth_time` VARCHAR(16) DEFAULT NULL COMMENT '乙方输入时辰', `person_b_is_leap_month` TINYINT DEFAULT 0 COMMENT '乙方是否闰月', `person_b_year_pillar` VARCHAR(16) DEFAULT NULL COMMENT '乙方年柱', `person_b_month_pillar` VARCHAR(16) DEFAULT NULL COMMENT '乙方月柱', `person_b_day_pillar` VARCHAR(16) DEFAULT NULL COMMENT '乙方日柱', `person_b_hour_pillar` VARCHAR(16) DEFAULT NULL COMMENT '乙方时柱', `person_b_ba_zi` VARCHAR(64) DEFAULT NULL COMMENT '乙方八字', `person_b_zodiac` VARCHAR(16) DEFAULT NULL COMMENT '乙方生肖', `person_b_shi_chen` VARCHAR(16) DEFAULT NULL COMMENT '乙方时辰', `person_b_lunar_text` VARCHAR(64) DEFAULT NULL COMMENT '乙方农历文本', `question` VARCHAR(1000) DEFAULT NULL COMMENT '用户问题', `prompt_text` LONGTEXT DEFAULT NULL COMMENT '提示词', `fortune_content` LONGTEXT DEFAULT NULL COMMENT 'AI分析结果', `model_name` VARCHAR(64) DEFAULT NULL COMMENT '模型名', `status` VARCHAR(20) DEFAULT 'PROCESSING' COMMENT '状态', `error_message` VARCHAR(500) DEFAULT NULL COMMENT '错误信息', `create_time` DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP COMMENT '创建时间', `update_time` DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP COMMENT '更新时间', PRIMARY KEY (`id`), KEY `idx_account` (`account`), KEY `idx_create_time` (`create_time`) ) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COMMENT='合八字姻缘记录表';
